items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather N82068 Grape Purple with Python. Established in 1854, the Capucines handbag was named after the street in Paris where the first store opened and was introduced in 2013. Crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather, it features a signature flap: the exterior displays the Monogram flower, while the interior reveals leather-covered letters. Dimensions: 31.5 x 20 x 11 cm

items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather N82068 Grape Purple with Python. This Capucines BB handbag features a refined structure crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather. It is equipped with a top handle, double-flap, and a glossy python-embossed logo, making it a stunning choice for day or night. A detachable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear to show off a modern look. Size: 27 * 18 * 9 cm

items.name_cn:
Premium Grade
Dior Handbag Set ❤ "Patent Leather Black"
This Lady Dior handbag is crafted from wine red patent calfskin, featuring the iconic diamond quilting and a removable "D.I.O.R." charm. It comes with a removable chain shoulder strap, as well as a removable card holder and zippered pouch, making it versatile for different uses. This handbag is eye-catching and can be paired with other items from the same collection.
"D.I.O.R." Charm
1 Spacious Interior Compartment
1 Slip Pocket
2 Removable Elements: 1 Zippered Pouch and 1 Card Holder with 8 Card Slots and 1 Slip Pocket
Removable Chain Strap: 120 cm
Dimensions: 21.5 x 11.5 x 3 cm
Model: 6612
Fits 1 iPhone 11 Pro

items.name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
Large #Crinkled Gold.
🆕FEND1 First is here!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first Fend1, overturning the previous bag shape. The metal trim and large Logo lock combined with the body design combine architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, it grabs attention instantly! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and also gives a high-end street chic vibe when worn crossbody!
Size 32cm
Style 127
